description: Ethan's manual overrides on top of the BBI v8.5 model output. MOMUS surfaces flagged players each Monday at 12:49 ET; this file is where you encode any decisions to override the model. Cleared/reset each Monday by Mnemosyne when CURRENT_EVENT.json rolls forward.

actions_supported.bbi_pool_delta: Additive adjustment to bbi_pool. Positive pushes UP, negative pushes DOWN. Applies proportional delta to bbi_dfs.
actions_supported.min_rank: Ensure final rank <= this number (player floor -- they finish at this rank or better).
actions_supported.max_rank: Ensure final rank >= this number (player ceiling -- they finish at this rank or worse).
actions_supported.exclude: Drop the player from rankings entirely. Use for late WDs.  Set value=true.
